subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have revealed the Book and have enjoined upon all therein steadfastness, trustworthiness, truthfulness and every virtuous quality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا انزلنا الکتاب و امرنا الکل فیه بالاستقامه و الامانه و الصداقه و بکل صفه
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
